_meta.note: Counterfactual: does each model's reject/veto/select decision predict the right forward-return direction? gap = mean_kept − mean_flagged. Block-sampled effective N. `significant` requires BOTH sides >= 10 AND a Welch's-z two-sample p-value < 0.05 (matches agent_scorecard's rigor — a sample-size floor alone is not a significance test). At ~weekly cadence this stays NOT_SIGNIFICANT for months (§7.4), by design.
